mcp_hot_reload.description: Added MCPClient::poll_notification() that does a 1ms timeout receive to detect incoming server notifications without blocking. Added ExtensionManager::reload_server_tools(server_name) that re-calls tools/list and updates the internal tools Vec. Added AgentEvent::MCPToolsChanged { server_name, tool_count } for UI notification. Updated all exhaustive matches in ava-praxis, ava-tui (event_handler, headless/single, bin/smoke).

mcp_resources.description: Added MCPResource and MCPResourceContent types. Added MCPClient::list_resources() (resources/list) and MCPClient::read_resource(uri) (resources/read). Added ExtensionManager::list_resources(server_name) and ExtensionManager::read_resource(server_name, uri) delegating to the per-server client via Mutex.

mcp_prompts.description: Added MCPPrompt, MCPPromptArgument, MCPPromptResult, MCPPromptMessage, MCPPromptContent types. Added MCPClient::list_prompts() (prompts/list) and MCPClient::get_prompt(name, arguments) (prompts/get). Added ExtensionManager::list_prompts(server_name) and ExtensionManager::get_prompt(server_name, prompt_name, arguments).

pre_existing_fixes.description: Fixed pre-existing compile errors found during work: TransportType::Http pattern missing fields in manager.rs, PluginPermissionDecision enum defined inside impl block in ava-plugin/manager.rs, missing bytes/dirs/open crate dependencies in ava-mcp/Cargo.toml.
